title: Business Draft
description: Frontmatter contract for business/drafts/*.md — the business → product contract. Drafts are transient artifacts that either advance into a living document (vision.md or product.md) or are discarded.

status.description: Draft lifecycle: draft (future, being written) → review (future, under consideration) → advanced (past, merged into a living doc) OR discarded (past, rejected).

advanced_into.description: Relative path to the living document this draft was merged into (e.g., 'business/vision/vision.md' or 'product/product.md').
